name: TERNS PHARMACEUTICALS INC
summary: TERNS PHARMACEUTICALS INC is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing therapies for non-alcoholic steatohepatitis (NASH) and other chronic liver diseases. The company is developing a portfolio of small molecule drug candidates to address the underlying causes of liver disease, with headquarters in Foster City, California. Terns Pharmaceuticals aims to improve the lives of patients with liver diseases.
